item.title: PASTA AL GRANCHIO 🦀One of the most surprisingly delicious meals ...
item.description:
View on Instagram


PASTA AL GRANCHIO 🦀One of the most surprisingly delicious meals I’ve ever madeIngredients-Dungess Crab -Salmon Roe (optional)-Shallot-Garlic-Lemon-Parsley-Basil-Calabrian chili or chili flakes -Butter-Dry white wine-Bucatini, spaghetti, or linguini-Burrata (optional)RECIPE-Break down your crab: cutting off the sharp tips of the leps, removing the belly flap, separating the body and the top shell -Scrape out and save the tomalley (“crab mustard” -Discard mandibles and gills, remove claws -Crack the claw pieces -Boil the crab for approximately 7 minutes -Remove the crab from water, let cool -Crack open the shell and remove the crab meat, set aside-Mince shallot, garlic, and parsley-Sauté ingredients in extra virgin olive oil until translucent-Add Calabrian chili or red pepper flakes (optional) with butter-Add dry white wine, cook it down-Cook your pasta-Add al dente pasta, cooked crab, lemon juice + zest-Emulsify the ingredients with reserved pasta waterPlate and serve! Add burrata and salmon roe for extra depth #food #cibo #italian #fusion #pasta #burrata #salmon

item.title: I’ve been testing out some schmears with the one and only @popup...
item.description:
View on Instagram


I’ve been testing out some schmears with the one and only @popupbagels —Caramelized Shallot and Aged Cheddar is a beautiful combination 👀 Should we roll out my schmear in stores?

item.title: DINNER Seabass with Orzo 🐟Ingredients-Shallots-Fennell-Garlic-Le...
item.description:
View on Instagram


DINNER Seabass with Orzo 🐟Ingredients-Shallots-Fennell-Garlic-Lemons-Small vine tomatoes-Parsley-Chicken or vegetable broth-Orzo-Seabass or other fish of choice -Extra virgin olive oil -Butter-Parmigiano Reggiano -Salt-Black pepperIt looks like a time-consuming dish but this comes together super easily and quickly, enjoy! #dinner #seafood #cooking #summerrecipes

item.title: LOMO SALTADO 🥩🇵🇪Ingredients-Beef sirloin, tenderloin, NY Strip-1...
item.description:
View on Instagram


LOMO SALTADO 🥩🇵🇪Ingredients-Beef sirloin, tenderloin, NY Strip-1 red onion-2-3 tomatoes-1-–2 ají tbs amarillo paste (or fresh if you can find!)-2-3 cloves garlic depending on your love of garlic-1/2 tsp ground cumin-Salt -Black pepper-2-3 tbs soy sauce *depends on your portion-1-2 tbs oyster sauce-1 tbs red wine vinegar-High heat oil (I used avocado oil)-Cilantro-A few stalks of green onionFor the French fries: -2–3 large russet potatoes-Salt-Neutral oil for fryingFor the Rice:-1 cup jasmine white rice-1/2 tbs oil of choice ( I used extra virgin olive oil)-2 cloves garlic or smashed -1 3/4 cups water or broth -Salt#lomosaltado #peruvianfood #cooking #dinner

item.title: Grilled Pineapple Mezcal Margaritas using @nosotros with my brot...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Grilled Pineapple Mezcal Margaritas using @nosotros with my brother! 🍍🍹 Ingredients-2 oz Nosotros Mezcal Ensamble-Fresh pineapple or pineapple juice-¾ oz fresh lime juice-½ oz agave syrup-Ice-Tajín (optional)#nosotrospartner #pineapple #margarita #summerrecipes

item.title: LINGUINE ALLE VONGOLE🤤 A taste of summer INGREDIENTS -Clams (Man...
item.description:
View on Instagram


LINGUINE ALLE VONGOLE🤤 A taste of summer INGREDIENTS -Clams (Manila, Carpet-Shell, Littleneck) -Garlic-Parsley (including stems) -Calabrian chili (or red pepper flakes)-Cherry Tomatoes-Dry white wine-Linguine or Spaghetti #vongole #cooking #italianfood #recipe #pasta

item.title: Pão de Queijo 🇧🇷Ingredients-Tapioca flour-Whole milk-Neutral oil...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Pão de Queijo 🇧🇷Ingredients-Tapioca flour-Whole milk-Neutral oil -Salt-Minas cheese (can substitute mozzarella if Minas is hard to find!)-Eggs#paodequiejo #brazilian #cooking

item.title: Birria Tacos braised with Pepsi Zero Sugar for the most deliciou...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Birria Tacos braised with Pepsi Zero Sugar for the most delicious caramelization @pepsi #PepsiPartner LINK IN BIO TO GRAB YOURS NOW Ingredients -Pepsi Zero Sugar -Beef chuck roast, short rib, goat, or lamb -Guajillo chilies -Ancho chilies -Pasilla chilies -White onion -Garlic -Roma tomatoes -Beef broth -Cinnamon stocks -Dried Oregano -Cumin -Bay leaves -Salt -Apple cider vinegar For the tacos -Corn tortillas -Oaxacan cheese -Chopped onion -Cilantro -Birria consommé #TuComidaMerecePepsi #birriatacos

item.title: Steak and potatoes night 🥩🥔 IngredientsFor the potatoes:-yellow ...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Steak and potatoes night 🥩🥔 IngredientsFor the potatoes:-yellow / yukon gold potatoes-parsley-salt-black pepper -garlic-parmigiano reggiano -butter-extra virgin olive oil For the leeks-leeks-avocado or olive oil -salt-pepper-chicken broth-rosemary and thymeFor the steak-Ribeye -Rosemary-Sage-Thyme -Garlic (I somehow forgot this when I basted it… I was hungry but definitely add this haha)-Salt-Black pepper-Beef tallow or other high heat oil For the red wine sauce (strained after reducing)-shallots-dry red wine -beef stock-rosemary #cooking #steak #dinner #smashedpotatoes

item.title: Basque Cheesecake || Tarta De Queso VascaFULL RECIPE IS ON MY SU...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Basque Cheesecake || Tarta De Queso VascaFULL RECIPE IS ON MY SUBSTACK LINK IN BIO😊Ingredients -Cream Cheese-Eggs-Sugar -Heavy cream -AP Flour-Pinch of salt -Vanilla bean pod (extract also works!)For the topping-Strawberries -Lemon juice and zest-Sugar #baking #tarta #dessert #recipes

item.title: Torta Ahogada 🥖Ingredients For the carnitas-Pork shoulder / pork...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Torta Ahogada 🥖Ingredients For the carnitas-Pork shoulder / pork butt-Pork lard-Salt-Black pepper-Mexican oregano-Ground cumin-Garlic cloves-White onion-Bay leaf-Cinnamon stick-Orange peel-Orange juice-Evaporated milk (optional)For the Tomato Sauce-Ripe tomatoes-Garlic -White onion-Salt-Guajillo chiles-Árbol chiles-Mexican oregano-VinegarFor the refried beans-Pinto beans -Broth-White onion-Garlic -Salt-Cumin-LardFor Garnishing-Pickled onions-Cilantro-AvocadoFor the Sandwich-Birote Salado or bolillo roll#torta #cooking
